Stiletto of the Bloodclaw  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 6
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Blood Claw (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 18
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD ROG NEC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Stiletto of the Bloodclaw
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 6
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Blood Claw (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 18
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD ROG NEC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:36
Lucy Entry By:Biny
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-15 03:13:59
Page Updated:Wed Apr 12th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 40pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Najena
NPC Name
Drelzna
The Widowmistress


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Najena

Post Comment
Damage changes?
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 6:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777468509
4 posts
How high does the damage go to? Also what lvl is this weapon good till...so i know when to get a better weapon
▲ Page top
RE: Damage changes?
QuoteReply
# Nov 10 2002 at 7:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
Sadly, it's only good until the proc starts to work... Kinda ironic. Not to say that it isn't good, but by then you can usually afford a better weapon. I used my until I was about 23, and I was sad to see the proc go, but there was so much better stuff out there. An almost 4 ratio is pretty sad nowadays.
▲ Page top
great weapon
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2002 at 10:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768551941
78 posts
i have this on my 28 BL and let me tell you all, this weapon is great! he hits for about 13-17 every time and with 135 dex, the proc is quite often. i use this and a walrus tooth when fighting blue mobs. i still use ulaks though. i would really reccomend this weapon to a rogue or another class with high dex.

QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 5:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780118431
17 posts
Damage changes as you go up in levels. If yours dosen't match the picture then it's only because your not the level of the person taking the picture.
▲ Page top
Embarassed
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2002 at 9:35 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
64 posts
I was in Najena owning all at 49 (rogue) when I stumbled across this evil wench. I was at 1/2 life and didn't think to con her before getting too close (everything else in there was green to me, why should she have been any different?). Turns out she was a dark blue and one bad inkie. She was peircing me for 80+ and bs'd me for 225. Needless to say I got owned *hangs head in shame*. I am going back with a druid friend for some quick heals and gonna teach her a lesson.

Agro
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2002 at 2:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
Proc on this agros pretty heavily. But, I love the effect, especially when it hits when the mob is running.

I have a 22 Rogue with about 115 Dex, and in a lucky fight this will proc 2-3 times. Kinda sucks cause it grabs all the attention, but 3x 20DD's and 3x30DOTS puts a mob down pretty fast.

2 posts
If you give an item to a creature that isnt no drop or summmoned the creature will drop it if it is killed just to let you know, i used to give little aviak egrets all the copper on me and watch a newb loot it and wonder why he weighs soooo much, lol
▲ Page top
beastlord offhander
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2001 at 7:11 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756915055
5 posts
i use this as a offhand weapon for my beastlord. main hand is a fireclaw talon. between my pet and my 2 proccing weapons at lv 22 even mobs drop fast and i can still solo yellows and retain near 1/2 life. not bad for a leather class fighter. it is hard to break aggro though with all the procs i may change one of them out if i start to die from aggro. 115 dex and this seem to proc at least once a combat on the average sometimes go 3 or 4 combats without a proc and all of a sudden it wont stop.

Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 12:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Blood Claw
Adding 1 Poison counters
Decrease Current Hitpoints by 20 (L1)
DoT for 30 Hit Points (HP) in 2 ticks


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 50 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Poison

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 2 ticks (12 seconds)
Duration Formula: 5

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You feel poison course through your veins.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso looks pained.
Spell fades: The poison wears off.
▲ Page top
Strategy...
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 7:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769181464
17 posts
The Widowmistress is 36-40 rogue and upon first attempt to solo her as a lvl 45 necromancer, she killed me... I tried the standard darkness, pet, dot, nuke strategy... she killed pet and came after me. Revised strategy and soloed her easily... New strategy... Have pet on standby, have Harmshield on standby, root, dot stack (not poison or scourge because the DD can break root), darkness, sit and med until she breaks root, root again... watch life go way down, send pet in when she's below half... Loot drops.

This strategy is for Necromancers, other groups attempt at your own risk.
▲ Page top
RE: Strategy...
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2002 at 1:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts

I was in this zone to get last item for my ghoulbane this morning (yay me got ghoulbane)
A lvl 23 rouge decided to help me and when in there the rouge saw The Widowmistress and logged in his lvl 51 cleric and we killed her.
She Dropped 2 Stiletto of the Bloodclaw's
(yes 2 for 1 kill)
so we got one each
heheh

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 08 2001 at 3:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) We walked right into her lair. A lvl 37 SK, a lvl 35 Pally and me, a lvl 35 druid. Dropped the Widowmistress and her pet spider like a bad habit and looted the Stiletto. Nice little piercer for my rogue. :~)

QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2001 at 6:59 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My friend and I went in after it for my rogue.....I am a 26 ShadowKnight and my Friend is a 31 Warrior.....we THOUGHT the WidowMistress was 30 but She conned red to my friend so she is obviously lvl 35 at LEAST.....She is a rogue with dual wield, double attack, and Apply Poison....she rapped us....I consider myself lucky to not have seen her backstab....hope this helps
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 10 2001 at 5:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) she isnt even close to 35. we had a group of 5 lvl 32 to 35. she was red to us all. she had us all bending over and grabbing our ankles. we went back though with a 52 necro for some pay back. stiletto is nice, but is it really worth 200pp?

▲ Page top
RE: No way is it 30 to get
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2002 at 5:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761090559
Scholar
22 posts
Drelzna does drop this. My Cleric goes into Najena just for fun every once in a while to beat up all the dark elves and make me feel special. The first time I killed Drelzna she dropped it and I got myself a nice item for my beastlord. She was extremely easy to my cleric at lvl 41. She is a shadow knight and harm touches. I'm not sure if it was her but one of the named DEs in Najena can do multiple harm touches in one battle. They've done it do me on 2 seperate affairs and the same happened to a guildy of mine. Not fair if you ask me. This happen to anyone else?
▲ Page top
RE: No way is it 30 to get
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 8:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758433518
Scholar
160 posts
Same thing happened to me in there. Against Drelzna as well. She opened with a HT on me. I beat on her a bit and then I darked her. I ran toward the entrance to find an area where I had more room to fearkite her. I got to my area and got staged. Darkness wore off and I expected her to be hot on my tail. She wasn't. She got her pathing messed up and couldn't follow me. As soon as I re-engaged her, she hit me with another HT. cheater. Luckily I still dropped her, but did take more damage than I though I would because of the double HTs.

As for Widowmistress, she is tough and a definite undercon IMO. I tried her solo as a 42 SK and I BARELY beat her. She was pretty MR. Had trouble keeping both fear and darkness up at the same time. I had to run the 1st time. Luckily I had Jboots effect still up. Second time I took the time to be careful and stay away from her when I didn't have her darked. That went much better and she fell in the end, but it was still nerve-wracking. Got the claw from her, not from Drelzna. IIRC she dropped Earring of Disease Reflection for me. Anyway it's a fun dungeon and sadly underused.

EDIT: Spelling

Edited, Mon Jul 8 21:06:00 2002
▲ Page top
Effect
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2001 at 4:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756535693
3 posts
Actually it hits for 20dd and then does 15 dmg a tic for 2 tics. So each time it procs you're doing an extra 50 dmg in 12 seconds.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 14 2001 at 4:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) takes lvl 30 to get hehe killed soulspanker on pvp server rallos zek got one form him at lvl 5 wonder if i should keep or sell?
fluke or error?
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2001 at 8:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591751881355
3 posts
I found this on an orc weaponsmith in EC...has anyone ever heard of this. Either way I was just wonderin'
▲ Page top
Re:fluke or error
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2001 at 5:18 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
My guess is that a higher lvl person wanted to give away a weapon but in such a way so that the person getting it "earned" it. If you give an item (or money for that matter) to a mob, as long as its not NO DROP, then the mob will have it on its corpse when its killed. Done it many times where i had a nice item, or some extra cash, that i did not need but did not want someone who just sits and begs to get it.
▲ Page top
RE: Re:fluke or error
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 5:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
While some items will show up on the mob's corpse if you give to them, money is one item that will NOT show up on the mob. Any money you give to a mob has effectively been destroyed.

Any nodrop item given to a mob is effectively destroyed.

If you give a weapon to a mob that already has a weapon, the new one may or may not stay on the mob. It depends on the relative speeds of the weapons, handedness, and whether or not the mob can wield the new weapon.

Other items may or may not stay on the mob, depending on how many items the mob already has or has been given.
▲ Page top
RE: Re:fluke or error
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 10:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Besides, with everyone so twinked now, that mob is very likely to lie there and go unlooted until the corpse vanishes, taking with it the nice item you gave it. Please don't think this is a good way to give something to a newer player, unless you see them killing AND looting -- and then why not just give it to them? They're already earning their was as it is.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 20 2001 at 1:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Want to see something funny? get a bag full of shaded torches from tower frozen shadow 7th floor and give to the orcs in EC... they proc steal strength even at this low lvl... funny to watch the noobs reactions:)
